CVE-2020-27827.title: A flaw was found in multiple versions of OpenvSwitch. Specially c ...
CVE-2020-27827.summary: A flaw was found in multiple versions of OpenvSwitch. Specially crafted LLDP packets can cause memory to be lost when allocating data to handle specific optional TLVs, potentially causing a denial of service. The highest threat from this vulnerability is to system availability.

CVE-2021-43612.title: In lldpd before 1.0.13, when decoding SONMP packets in the sonmp_ ...
CVE-2021-43612.summary: In lldpd before 1.0.13, when decoding SONMP packets in the sonmp_decode function, it's possible to trigger an out-of-bounds heap read via short SONMP packets.

CVE-2023-41910.title: An issue was discovered in lldpd before 1.0.17. By crafting a CDP ...
CVE-2023-41910.summary: An issue was discovered in lldpd before 1.0.17. By crafting a CDP PDU packet with specific CDP_TLV_ADDRESSES TLVs, a malicious actor can remotely force the lldpd daemon to perform an out-of-bounds read on heap memory. This occurs in cdp_decode in daemon/protocols/cdp.c.
